items.summary: Kouji Miura's Ao no Hako (Blue Box) manga has concluded with chapter 250 in the 33rd issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine on Monday, after a 5-year serialization. Miura originally drew the sports romance manga as a one-

items.title: Manga 'Munou na Nana' Concludes Ten-Year Serialization
